initiatives.name: Family Soup Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Doing what local government won't. Distributing necessities to the community who needs it the most. Operating weekly.

initiatives.name: CODEPINK Reno
initiatives.description: The Reno chapter of CODEPINK, a national anti-war and feminist protest group.

initiatives.name: Reno Sparks Tenant Union
initiatives.description: A volunteer-led union building and protecting tenant power through collective action.

initiatives.name: The Radical Cat
initiatives.description: A feminist radical bookstore, cat adoption center, and community space located at 1500 S. Virginia Street.

initiatives.name: Our Center
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through LGBTQ+ advocacy and services in Northern Nevada. They coordinate support groups, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing, health services, and creating spaces for queer and trans people to thrive.

initiatives.name: Heater Bloc Reno
initiatives.description: DIY tent-safe heaters, community built and shared with our unhoused neighbors. Build with us or build your own!
